Speaker.rawBytes: EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E4 BC 8A E7 B9 94 20 E9 A0 86 E5 B9 B3
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B2 B3 E7 BE BD 20 E3 82 86 E3 81 8B E3 82 8A
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E7 9C 9F E7 94 B0 20 E6 98 8E E5 BD A6
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E6 A1 90 E6 9D A1 20 E7 BE 8E E9 B6 B4
EF BC 88 EF BC B3 EF BC A5 EF BC 89 E5 B1 B1 E5 B2 B8 20 E9 A2 A8 E8 8A B1

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry for calling you all again so soon, but I brought something special today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Well, let me just show you before I get into explaining what it is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'd like to provide you with some {f 0 1 33}new equipment{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}After spending quite some time in development, we're now ready for the battle testing phase.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}The Shadows are getting stronger. You just barely won the last battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}We can only assume they'll grow even more powerful still. That's why you all need something more to stay in the fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}From now on, I want everyone to use these during your operations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Combat gear, complete with a matching armband, and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Your new trump card in the battle against the Shadows: cartridges that enable the use of {f 0 1 33}Theurgy{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Theurgy means "spiritual magic that could reach the gods" in Greek.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}To put it simply, it synchronizes with the user's emotions, and when the right conditions are met, allows them to unleash an attack of immense power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh, you're talking about signature attacks! Aw, yeah! I've been waitin' for something like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Well, about that... It's a bit difficult to explain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}I think it might be easier if you just try it out for yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Oh, please. If you can handle a Persona, this should hardly be any more difficult.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's been thoroughly tested for safety, too. So nothing to worry about there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Hold on, isn't it dangerous to use something like this without knowing how it works?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Oh, don't worry about that. It's been well-tested and determined completely safe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Oh, don't worry about that. It's been well-tested and determined completely safe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'm sure you'll get a chance to see it in action as you continue your battles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Oh, there's a manual for it as well. Take a look at it if you feel the need.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Well, I'm sure glad I made it in today.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 0 25 25}With Yamagishi-kun joining us, Kirijo-kun can go back to being a frontline fighter. That means SEES is going to have a new lineup after today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}And what better time than now to roll out this new weapon, don't you agree?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I'd like to talk more about this, but I've been quite busy with the investigation into those large Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}I think we're on the verge of a breakthrough though, so I'll be sure to let you know what we find out soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Okay. I'm leaving the rest to you, Kirijo-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I sort of thought this before, but he's rather laid-back, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}It's fine. We should just give it a go, like the chairman said.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}In fact, since everyone's already here, now might be the best opportunity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Let's head into Tartarus and try out our new equipment.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I've been wanting to get back into the swing of things, anyway. And this will serve as a good test of our team lineup with Yamagishi as backup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 9 25 25}Let's give this Theurgy stuff a shot. Can't wait to see what kind of punch it's packing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Man, this trump card stuff is getting me so pumped up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I'm gonna be all like, "Take this! Super Ace Junpei Attack!" ...Or something like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Aw, don't be like that. He brought these just for us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}And you wouldn't wanna miss out on my super cool finishing move, would ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}That I don't care about, but we should go for Fuuka's sake, so she can get used to things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I'm a little nervous since it's my first time, but I'll follow your lead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}All right, we'll go into Tartarus once everyone is geared up.[n]{f 1 1}
